title: Antigravity Extension
outcome: A browser-extension control layer that keeps OAuth 2.0 token refresh and background jobs isolated from visible UI state.

title: AI-Source Flow Visualizer (ASFV)
outcome: A local-first visualizer that maps source inputs through Ollama-backed AI stages into inspectable data-flow pipelines.

title: Personal Finance Manager
outcome: A C# WinForms finance application with strict N-tier boundaries and rigid SQLite schemas for auditable transaction history.
